auth.loginSuccessDesc: Welcome back! Redirecting to your dashboard...
auth.loginFailedDesc: Your email or password is incorrect. Please try again.
auth.registrationSuccessDesc: Your account has been created successfully. Redirecting to dashboard...
auth.forgotPasswordEmail: Enter your email to receive password reset instructions
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email to receive password reset instructions
auth.resetInstructionsSent: Check your email for password reset instructions. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
auth.howToReset: How would you like to reset your password?
auth.emailVerificationLinkDesc: Receive a link to reset your password (expires in 1 hour)
auth.otpCodeDesc: Receive a 6-digit code via email (expires in 5 minutes)
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your new password to complete the reset
auth.otpRequiredDesc: Only fill this if you received a one-time password via email
auth.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login...

dashboard.serviceClosedWarningDesc: You can still complete the Application Form but the Service is closed. File issuance will be carried out from 7:30 to 21:00 WIB

tutorial.title: Quick Tutorial
tutorial.welcome: Welcome to Medivac Dashboard. Let's take a quick tour!
tutorial.stats: Here you can see the summary of your evacuation requests and their current status.
tutorial.createNew: Click here to start a new evacuation request. Make sure you have all required documents ready.
tutorial.archive: Your completed requests will be stored here for easy access and downloading.
tutorial.adminChart: Monitor the activity of incoming requests throughout the year.
tutorial.adminRecent: Keep track of the most recent applications awaiting your attention.
tutorial.sidebar: Need help? You can restart this tutorial anytime from this button.

evacuation.title: Air Medical Evacuation
evacuation.acceptedFormats: Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, PDF

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete This item?
messages.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please login again.
messages.unauthorized: You don't have permission to access this resource
messages.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
messages.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

permohonan.title: Request Form
permohonan.subtitle: Air Medical Evacuation
permohonan.flightSectionDesc: Travel details and aircraft fleet information.
permohonan.patientSectionDesc: Identity and biological data of the evacuated patient.
permohonan.uploadSectionDesc: Ensure uploaded files are clear and readable (Max. 5MB).
permohonan.submitFailed: An error occurred while submitting data
permohonan.errorDesc: An error occurred while submitting data

errors.tooClose: Application must be submitted at least 24 hours before departure time.

tour.stepper: Monitor your form completion progress through this step indicator.
tour.form: Enter detail information correctly. Some fields are mandatory.
tour.upload: Upload supporting documents here. The system will automatically optimize your file size.
tour.nav: Use these buttons to move between steps or submit your request.

verifikasi.title: Application Verification
verifikasi.revPlaceholder: Example: All documents are unclear, please re-upload...

tour.stats: View quick statistics of applications that need verification.
tour.table: A list of all incoming applications is neatly organized here.
tour.detail: Click the detail button to see full information and patient documents.
tour.actions: As an admin, you can approve or request data revisions here.

revisi.title: Application Revision
revisi.desc: List of your applications requiring data correction.
revisi.formDesc: Please correct the data based on the verifier's notes.

tour.list: Check which applications you need to fix.
tour.note: Pay attention to the revision notes from the admin to know what to change.
tour.edit: Click the edit button to start fixing your application data.

selesai.title: Completed Documents
selesai.desc: Archive of all applications that have been successfully published.
selesai.descPreview: Preview of the published official permit document.

tour.archive: Your completed application history is securely stored here.
tour.preview: You can view a preview of the published permit document.
tour.download: Download your official document for operational needs.

penerbitan.title: Document Publication
penerbitan.desc: Manage the publication of official permit documents for valid applications.
penerbitan.descAdmin: Manage and publish permit documents for validated applications.
penerbitan.descUser: View and download your published permit documents.
penerbitan.descPreview: Preview of the permit document before publication.

tour.queue: A queue of validated applications ready for document publication.
tour.upload: Upload the signed official permit document file.
tour.submit: Submit the document to change the application status to Completed.
